examples: The garner can help the old remember things for longer.
We have no problem understanding a movie where somebody goes to sleep as a teenager and wakes up as Jennifer Garner, as an older person.
Blue diamonds have been known to garner high prices.
Audience members can wander where they like and talk to cast members in order to garner clues.
His interpreter waved the man away, and Garner returned by motorcade to Kuwait City.
